/.claim: The Star Citizen crowdfunding campaign launched October 2012, but public alpha testing did not begin until later (Hangar Module 2013, Arena Commander 2014) — 'in open development since 2012' is accurate, 'in public alpha since 2012' is not.
Star Citizen crossed $1 billion in total funding raised on May 24, 2026, from over 6.5 million backer accounts.
CIG announced a 2026 launch window for Squadron 42 at CitizenCon 2954 (October 2024).
Squadron 42 is a separate, not-yet-released single-player title; the live Star Citizen PU has no dedicated single-player campaign mode.

/billion.claim: Star Citizen crossed $1 billion in total funding raised on May 24, 2026, from over 6.5 million backer accounts.

/the-story.claim: The Star Citizen crowdfunding campaign launched October 2012, but public alpha testing did not begin until later (Hangar Module 2013, Arena Commander 2014) — 'in open development since 2012' is accurate, 'in public alpha since 2012' is not.
Star Citizen crossed $1 billion in total funding raised on May 24, 2026, from over 6.5 million backer accounts.
Squadron 42 was announced together with Star Citizen by Chris Roberts at GDC Online in Austin on October 10, 2012, as the campaign's Wing Commander-style single-player component.
